captures.notes: Canonical Spline site link for attribution and product/workflow framing; local evidence below is generated from scratch for learning review.
Local generated rebuild screenshot showing layered 3D UI panels, spatial nodes, state tracks, hotspots, and depth lines; not copied from Spline scenes.
Local generated motion clip isolates panel morph, node motion, and hotspot state changes; not copied from Spline scenes.
Standalone local HTML/SVG exercise reconstructing the primitive with generated panels, nodes, state tracks, hotspots, and CSS-only morph motion.
Manifest lists only generated local learning evidence plus source-link attribution boundaries.

payload.visual_role: teaches how a 3D object scene becomes an interface with states and actions

modules.review_notes: Complete for first-pass learning: still image, motion clip, and code note all show the same spatial UI primitive.

payload.input_model: hotspots stand in for hover/click event targets
payload.motion_model: panels, nodes, and hotspots shift together to reveal state transitions

modules.review_notes: Interaction state is represented as named states plus still and motion evidence.

payload.evidence_layer: local PNG proves spatial UI structure, local GIF proves morph state, HTML note proves the layer taxonomy
payload.learning_primitive: review workspace as spatial UI sculpture
payload.review_gap: canonical Spline site remains link-only; local rebuild teaches mechanics without Spline scenes or runtime
payload.route_decision: use panels for review surfaces, nodes for evidence anchors, state tracks for workflow transitions, hotspots for reviewer actions, and morph motion for state changes
payload.source_trail: canonical Spline site plus generated local reconstruction
payload.uncertainty: exact Spline scene library, renderer, templates, and export behavior are not claimed

modules.review_notes: VULCA mapping is complete because source, evidence, review gap, route decision, and uncertainty are all represented.

summary: Contemporary 3D web product reference rebuilt as a local spatial UI sculpture primitive with panels, nodes, state tracks, hotspots, motion, code, and asset evidence.
title: Spline Contemporary 3D Web References
why_relevant: Completes the atlas's UI-sculpture branch by teaching spatial interface composition and event-state design without importing Spline scenes.
